'''Cadezia''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the same [[Star system/Legends|system]] as [[Trulalis]] and [[Issor]]. It was a prosperous technology and business world.

{{Planet-stub}}
